author: doll-agent
content: Done. mean_as_f64 already existed (line 940); added var_as_f64 and std_as_f64 siblings in ferray-stats/src/reductions/mod.rs that accept any T: ToPrimitive (i8/16/32/64, u8/16/32/64, plus floats) and return Array<f64, IxDyn>. Both promote each element to f64 via ToPrimitive::to_f64 and delegate to the existing float-typed var/std_. Matches numpy.var/numpy.std semantics where integer inputs auto-promote to f64. Four new tests verify: (1) i64 input → f64 var with ddof=0; (2) i32 with ddof=1; (3) u32 → f64 std; (4) 2-D i64 axis-0 var. ferray-stats: 234 lib tests pass, cargo clippy clean. Existing T: Float-bound var/std_ remain as the fast path for callers who already have float arrays — no change in semantics for them.
